title: India crude imports set to remain elevated in January
section_path: India crude imports set to remain elevated in January
section_path_text: India crude imports set to remain elevated in January
summary:
Main
India crude imports are approaching record levels in January as non-Russian crude arrivals surge amid a pivot from Russia-origin crude. By Ivan Mathews
India's crude/condensate imports are on track to remain elevated for the third consecutive month and reach record levels of 5.2mbd in January. This report examines the drivers behind the recent rise in crude arrivals and provides an outlook for India's feedstock procurement strategy.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
India crude imports are approaching record levels in January as non-Russian crude arrivals surge amid a pivot from Russia-origin crude. By Ivan Mathews
India's crude/condensate imports are on track to remain elevated for the third consecutive month and reach record levels of 5.2mbd in January.

children.title: Reliance and HMEL reduce intake of Russia-origin crude
section_path: Reliance and HMEL reduce intake of Russia-origin crude
children.section_path_text: Reliance and HMEL reduce intake of Russia-origin crude
children.summary: The increase in India's total crude imports was driven by a surge in non-Russian crude arrivals, which more than offset the decline in Russia-origin crude imports. Discharges of Russian crude are set to fall further in January, extending a post‑November unwind and signaling a strategic pivot among major refiners.

children.title: Non-Russian crude imports set to reach two‑year highs
section_path: Non-Russian crude imports set to reach two‑year highs
children.section_path_text: Non-Russian crude imports set to reach two‑year highs
children.summary: Non-Russian crude arrivals continue to rise m-o-m in January amid higher purchases by private refiners and sustained imports by NOCs. Discharges into terminals linked to Reliance and HMEL have increased from November levels, as these refiners import more mainstream oil in replacement of Russian barrels.

children.title: US-India trade deal will have a major impact on India's crude procurement strategy
section_path: US-India trade deal will have a major impact on India's crude procurement strategy
children.section_path_text: US-India trade deal will have a major impact on India's crude procurement strategy
children.summary: Discounts on Russian crude continue to widen (Argus) amid lower imports by India and Turkey and elevated Russia-origin crude on water . We hear from market sources that Reliance purchased Russian crude from non-sanctioned entities and these cargoes could arrive in February or March.
